/ Some background · CeriX

Where I'm coming from.

About CeriX: CeriX is one of Denmark's leading aesthetic clinic groups, with multiple clinics and private hospitals specializing in non-surgical treatments, laser procedures, and plastic surgery. Our focus has always been on combining medical expertise, strong branding, and exceptional patient experiences to build a trusted, premium healthcare brand.

/ Some of the CeriX team

18 clinics. 3 hospitals.
One philosophy.

Doctors · master nurses · specialists across Denmark
/ The story

From one clinic to a national chain.

2016. We open the first CeriX clinic in central Copenhagen. The mission: a cosmetic clinic with real clinical authority, honest advice, and natural-looking results.

Today. CeriX operates 18 clinics across Denmark plus three private hospitals offering cosmetic plastic surgery. We are registered with the Danish Patient Safety Authority and have performed more than 150,000 treatments.

What we built underneath. CeriX Institute — Denmark's leading training center for cosmetic nurses. Standardized protocols across all locations. A team that runs without me being in the room.

Read the full CeriX story →
/ Watch · Inside our flagship clinic
A tour · ~2 min
Teaching cosmetic nurses
/ Training is not new to me

I've trained cosmetic nurses for many years.

Through CeriX Institute and across our 18 clinics, I've spent the last decade training and mentoring cosmetic nurses. It's something I genuinely love doing.

What I'm starting now is just an extension of that — taking what I've taught inside our own organization and sharing it with clinic owners outside Denmark too. What exactly that looks like is what these research conversations will help me figure out.

/ Clarity call for research

Right now, I'm listening.

I'm interested in understanding what cosmetic clinic owners are really experiencing today — the challenges they face, what's working, what isn't, and where they see the biggest opportunities.

Rather than making assumptions, I'd much rather hear directly from the people who are living it every day.

If you own or manage a cosmetic clinic and you're open to a 30-minute conversation — not a sales call, not a pitch, just an honest exchange of experiences — I would genuinely love to hear your story and learn from your perspective.

What we'll talk about

1
Where you are now Your clinic, your stage, your biggest wins this year — and the things that keep you up at night.
2
What you've tried Courses, coaches, books, podcasts, communities. What helped. What was a waste. What you wish existed.
3
What would actually help If you could get help with one specific thing right now — what would it be, and what would the right kind of help look like?
What you get for the 30 minutes: a direct conversation with someone who's been through the journey. Concrete feedback on whatever you bring up. And — if you want it — early access to whatever I end up building. No follow-up sales sequence.

About me
/ About me

Co-founder. operator. educator.

I'm Kjenneth LeClaire. Co-founder and CXO of CeriX. My wife Rie and I started with one clinic in Copenhagen in 2016. Today we operate 18 clinics, three private hospitals, and Denmark's leading cosmetic nurse training institute.

Rie is the clinical authority. I'm the business architect. Together we built something I'm genuinely proud of — and now I want to share what we learned with other clinic owners who are on the same journey.

Rie LeClaire-Rosenblum Co-founder · Master cosmetic nurse · CeriX Institute
/ Why I'm doing this
"It took us a decade to figure out what works. If I can help other clinic owners get there faster — by sharing what we learned along the way — I'd love to do that. But first I want to understand what would actually be useful."
Kjenneth LeClaire Co-founder, CeriX
2026 Research phase

If you're a clinic owner,
I'd love to connect with you.
